recommendV2EWhen: The target is a release artifact, not a developer/debug artifact.
The user explicitly enables reducer mutation.
Only LocalVariableTable and LocalVariableTypeTable stripping is requested.
V2-B or reducer dry-run estimates meaningful removable local-variable metadata.
Signed, multi-release, and sealed jars are skipped or explicitly reviewed.
Semantic smoke passes for the deployment shape.
Any runtime performance claim passes V2-C validation and V2-D attribution.
doNotRecommendWhen: The build is intended for debugging local variable values.
The user requests LineNumberTable, StackMapTable, annotation, Signature, or BootstrapMethods stripping.
The deployment relies on unreviewed signed, multi-release, or sealed jars being rewritten.
A runtime claim is desired but V2-C confirmation is unavailable.
currentConfirmedRuntimeScope: PetClinic customers-service only, EXPLODED_BOOT_APP, NO_CDS_LOW_DIRTY, MALLOC_ARENA_MAX=1, no CDS/AppCDS/Leyden/javaagent.
